summary: Regression testing after major code refactoring (route_registry pattern, TypeScript migration, DigitalOnboarding split). All 14 test cases passed. Backend: 7/7 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: route_registry.py: Clean centralized route registration - 120 routes loaded, 0 skipped
server.py: Refactored from 129 inline imports to use route_registry pattern - much cleaner
DigitalOnboarding.jsx: Split from 1369 to 601 lines with 7 extracted section components
apiClient.ts: Fixed TypeScript error - added process declaration for env access
formatters.ts: Well-typed utility functions for currency, percent, number formatting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 122 verified all refactoring changes: (1) route_registry.py loads 120 routes successfully, (2) DigitalOnboarding split into 7 section components, (3) TypeScript migration started with apiClient.ts and formatters.ts, (4) All existing features continue to work. /buffett-trading route shows blank page (route removed from App.js, no 404 page configured - expected behavior).

test_1_health_endpoint.details: Returns 200 OK with status: healthy, architecture: modular

test_2_market_data_api.details: Returns 17 indicators (ASX 200, S&P 500, Dow Jones, NASDAQ, FTSE 100, etc.)

test_3_news_api.details: Returns 20 live headlines from Bloomberg, CNBC, MarketWatch, Financial Times, Economist

test_4_compliance_dashboard_api.details: Returns MongoDB data: 5 files, avg score 79%

test_5_voice_assistant_api.details: GPT-5.2 responds to financial questions via FormData

test_6_personal_dashboard.details: Shows David & Sarah Thompson, Net Worth $1,608,800

test_7_stock_trading_5_tabs.details: 5 tabs present: Portfolio, Buffett Ideas, Valuations, Backtest, News

test_9_news_tab_live_headlines.details: Shows live headlines from Bloomberg, CNBC, MarketWatch, Financial Times

test_10_adviser_compliance_dashboard.details: Shows 'Live from MongoDB', 5 files, clients: Michael Chen, Jennifer & Robert Smith

test_11_voice_fab_button.details: Microphone FAB button visible at bottom-right corner

test_12_language_selector.details: Language selector showing 'English' visible in sidebar bottom

test_13_buffett_trading_removed.details: Route removed from App.js - shows blank page (no 404 page configured)

test_14_no_console_errors.details: No critical JavaScript console errors (only network timing 'Failed to fetch' during initial load)

typescript_migration.details: TypeScript configured with strict: false for gradual migration

onboarding_sections.details: 7 components: PersonalSection, EmploymentSection, AssetsSection, LiabilitiesSection, InsuranceSection, GoalsSection, RiskSection

mocked_apis_list: Buffett Ideas stock data (static in StockTrading.jsx)
mocked_apis.notes: Voice Assistant uses real GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key. News tab and Compliance Dashboard use live backend APIs.
